title: Temptation
writer: James B. Fagan, Robert Hichens, Robert Thoeren
actors: Merle Oberon, George Brent, Charles Korvin
plot: Ruby, a beautiful divorcee with a shady past, marries a rich Egyptologist, and while he continues excavating a Pharoah's tomb, she becomes bored until she falls for a debt-ridden, blackmailing Egyptian prince.
